description: Intel 80286 instruction additions. The 80286 introduced protected mode and a set of privileged system-management instructions. These instructions operate on descriptor tables, task registers, and protection-related CPU state. All are ring-0 (privileged) in protected mode.

opcodes.description: Clear Task-Switched bit (TS) in CR0; used by OS to enable FPU context switching

instructions.description: Clear Task-Switched Flag: clears the TS bit in CR0. Used by OS kernel to enable FPU context switching.

opcodes.description: Load Global Descriptor Table Register from memory (6-byte pseudo-descriptor)

instructions.description: Load Global Descriptor Table Register (GDTR) from a 6-byte memory operand (limit:base).

opcodes.description: Store Global Descriptor Table Register to memory

instructions.description: Store Global Descriptor Table Register (GDTR) to a 6-byte memory operand.

opcodes.description: Load Interrupt Descriptor Table Register from memory

instructions.description: Load Interrupt Descriptor Table Register (IDTR) from a 6-byte memory operand (limit:base).

opcodes.description: Store Interrupt Descriptor Table Register to memory

instructions.description: Store Interrupt Descriptor Table Register (IDTR) to a 6-byte memory operand.

opcodes.description: Load Local Descriptor Table Register from selector in r/m16

instructions.description: Load Local Descriptor Table Register (LDTR) from a 16-bit selector.

opcodes.description: Store Local Descriptor Table Register selector to r/m16

instructions.description: Store Local Descriptor Table Register (LDTR) selector to a 16-bit register or memory.

opcodes.description: Load Task Register from selector in r/m16

instructions.description: Load Task Register (TR) from a 16-bit selector; marks the TSS as busy.

opcodes.description: Store Task Register selector to r/m16

instructions.description: Store Task Register (TR) selector to a 16-bit register or memory.

opcodes.description: Verify segment selector for read access; ZF=1 if readable

instructions.description: Verify segment selector for read access: sets ZF = 1 if the segment is readable at current privilege level.

opcodes.description: Verify segment selector for write access; ZF=1 if writable

instructions.description: Verify segment selector for write access: sets ZF = 1 if the segment is writable at current privilege level.

opcodes.description: Load Machine Status Word (low 16 bits of CR0) from r/m16

instructions.description: Load Machine Status Word into the low 16 bits of CR0. Used to switch to protected mode on 80286.
instructions.notes: Requires ring-0. Superseded by MOV CR0 on 80386+.

opcodes.description: Store Machine Status Word (low 16 bits of CR0) to r/m16

instructions.description: Store Machine Status Word (lower 16 bits of CR0) to a register or memory.

opcodes.description: Adjust RPL (Requested Privilege Level) of selector in r/m16 to match r16; sets ZF if adjusted

instructions.description: Adjust Requested Privilege Level: adjusts the RPL field of a segment selector to the maximum of itself and r16.
instructions.notes: Opcode 0x63 is repurposed as MOVSXD in 64-bit long mode.
